function.message: You still owe the Emperor one finished squad and at least one real game night.

Exhaustive reads of every file in 60_outbox/channels found the target only in 60_outbox/channels/grimdark_discord.md, where Lukas Brenner authored the quoted message on 2026-05-05; no later Lukas-attributed message exists in other channel logs.
